name: md2pdf
description: Convert Markdown files into clean, shareable PDFs locally.

scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:vitest && npm run test:unit:node
scripts.test:unit:node: npm run build && node --test dist/tests/unit/commandLine.test.js dist/tests/unit/converter.test.js dist/tests/unit/helpText.test.js dist/tests/unit/overwrite.test.js dist/tests/unit/paths.test.js dist/tests/unit/runCli.test.js
